mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_rad_drill WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY drill_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_rad_drill WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rad_drill WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_rad_drill (drill_date, drill_type, scenario, participants, owner_name, result, improvement, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{drillDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{drillType}, #{scenario}, #{participants}, #{ownerName}, #{result}, #{improvement}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_rad_drill SET drill_date = #{drillDate,jdbcType=DATE}, drill_type = #{drillType}, scenario = #{scenario}, participants = #{participants}, owner_name = #{ownerName}, result = #{result}, improvement = #{improvement}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_rad_drill SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
